# Architecture Decision Records — serving-contracts

One file per decision, numbered `NNNN-short-title.md`, never rewritten after acceptance — a
superseding decision gets a new ADR that references the old one.

Template:

```markdown
# ADR-NNNN — <title>

- **Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Superseded by ADR-MMMM
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD

## Context
## Decision
## Consequences
```

## Index

| ADR | Title | Status |
|---|---|---|
| [0001](0001-bundle-versioning.md) | Bundle versioning, not per-schema versioning | Accepted |
| [0002](0002-json-schema-draft.md) | JSON Schema draft pinned to 2020-12 | Accepted (re-confirm at SC-T002/T003) |
| [0003](0003-openapi-version.md) | OpenAPI 3.1.x for the inference API spec | Accepted (re-confirm at SC-T002) |
| [0004](0004-fixture-layout.md) | Fixture layout under `examples/` | Accepted |
